content:
记录 iOS 开发日常的错误集合，不再单独写错误文章，除非有必要。
一部分是在简书，所以链接过来。

## __日常上架打回__
-  [iOS 上架报错  This bundle is invalid. 或 Invalid Image Path](http://www.jianshu.com/p/6d395118fda1)
-  [iOS 特殊功能 This app attempts to access privacy-sensitive data without a usage description](http://www.jianshu.com/p/e185a1f30bfb)
-  [iOS 支付 3. 1.1 BUSINESS: PAYMENTS - IN-APP PURCHASE Business - 3.1.1](http://www.jianshu.com/p/e185a1f30bfb)
- [iOS 文件位置错误 Swift 2.2 拒绝2.23 - Apps must follow the iOS Data Storage Guidelines or they will be rejected](http://www.jianshu.com/p/fad87e487ac0)

## __日常错误__
- 注意 shareSDK，不支持 iOS8 模拟器，所以注销就 OK


-  [iOS 适配iOS8 arc4random() 崩溃 Swift3.0](http://www.jianshu.com/p/2e66853fd326)
-  [iOS is missing from working copy Xcode8 Swift 3.0](http://www.jianshu.com/p/cac66878198c)
-  [iOS：warning: (armv7) unable to open object file: No such file or directory](http://www.jianshu.com/p/3341989c7004)
-  [CocoaPods 错误解决--Attempt to read non existent folder](http://www.jianshu.com/p/784748a2b261)
-  [iOS 多版本X [!] Unable to add a source with url \`https://github.com/CocoaPods/Specs.git\` named \`master-1\`](http://www.jianshu.com/p/a226813d4f5d)
-  [ShareSDK code：207 报错， 还有plist设置iOS 9 坑](http://www.jianshu.com/p/e46959f1f185)
- [Apple 账号wen t Please sign in with an app-specific password. You can create one at appleid.apple.com](http://www.jianshu.com/p/8140311f0263)
- [pod - 报错 The dependency `xxx` is not used in any concrete target](http://www.jianshu.com/p/2f9184b5b46c)
- [swiftc failed with exit code 1](http://www.jianshu.com/p/930978f92ca4)
- [Performance - 2.3.7](http://www.jianshu.com/p/40ec89b8260b)
- [If your contracts are not in effect at this time 收费问题：协议、税务和银行业务](http://www.jianshu.com/p/c1018cbad507)

## __Apple 开发者到期__
-  [当 Apple 开发者到期之后 App 是否下架？开发者续费是否上架？](http://liangtongzhuo.com/atricle.html?5a0cd4f217d0090040bb65e8)
title: iOS 原生错误贴集合
